# pfsense_interface_group (Resource)

[Interface group](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/interfaces/groups.html). Interface groups allow applying firewall rules to multiple interfaces at once.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pfsense_interface_group" "example" {
  name        = "SERVERS"
  members     = ["lan", "opt1"]
  description = "Server interfaces"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the interface group. Must be unique, maximum 15 characters.

### Optional

- `description` (String) For administrative reference (not parsed).
- `members` (List of String) List of logical interface names (e.g. 'lan', 'opt1') that are members of this group.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import an interface group by name
terraform import pfsense_interface_group.example SERVERS
```
